params.name: The Persistent Memory
params.description:
On Jan 13, 1931 AD, the Persistence of Memory was created, which is seen as a classic work of surrealism.
This oil painting is one of the representative works of the surrealist painter Dalí. In this painting, Dalí depicts a beach of dead silence, with several soft and twisted clock faces, dead tree branches, flies and ants on the clock faces, and an abstract shape in the center of the scene. Although this scene seems very discordant, the painter vividly depicts it with a unique style, giving …
